metrics_definition.auc: ROC AUC via Mann-Whitney rank statistic (tie-corrected).
metrics_definition.brier: Mean squared error of predicted probability.

note: SYNTHETIC data. This evaluation uses a cohort generated by the BKT generative process, NOT real students. Numbers are the actual computed metrics on that synthetic held-out set.
protocol: Per student-skill sequence, hold out the final attempt and predict it from the preceding attempts.
